calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-19-2009 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-15-2009 Continued To Sep-01-09 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-30-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-30-2009 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-21-09 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Settlement Conference. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Linda Forester, CSR #13286.

Gerald D. Launay, Esq. appeared with plaintiffs Yuk Mui Pang, a/k/a Linda Pang, and Yuet Yan Pang, a/k/a Yuet Pang, who were placed under oath and examined.
Frank H. Kim, Esq. appeared with defendant Guo-Wen Zhou, who was placed under oath and examined.
Defendant Yuk Lin Tam Zhou was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on October 15, 2008.

Settlement agreement reached by the parties was placed on the record by Mr. Kim. In accordance with the terms of the agreement, plaintiffs and defendant Yuk Lin Tam Zhou shall pay defendant Guo-Wen Zhou the sum of $200,000.00. In return, defendant Guo-Wen Zhou shall transfer title of the subject premises, located @ 191 Venus Street, San Francisco, CA, to plaintiffs as Tenants In Common within 120 days of said payment. All parties agree to a mutual release of of claims.
Cross-complaint filed by Guo-Wen Zhou against cross-defendants Yuk Lin Tam Zhou, Yuk Mui Pang and Yuet Yan Pang, along with does 1 to 10, inclusive, shall be dismissed within 120 days of the releas of the lis pendens.

Matter is continued to July 21, 2009 @ 10:00 a.m. in Department 212 on the CRC 3.1385 Dismissal Calendar.

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-29-2008 Set For Trial On Mar-30-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-15-2008 Set For Trial On Jan-12-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
